title: [podman-5.8] Bump common to v0.67.0
body:
This is the final dance step in this repository for Podman v5.8.  This vendors c/image v5.39.1 and c/stoarge v1.62.0 into common, and then created c/common v0.67.0.

Note, there was no vendor directory in the podman-5.8 branch, which surprised me, so this is dragging in a boatload of files into that directory.

Next dance step, Buidlah v1.43.0.

comments.body: I think it is best to remove the vendor dir here, it is not needed.
@Luap99 that's a new twist for me.  I may close this PR and create a new one, but will see.  Regardless, I'll make the vendor dir disappear.
OK, bonus, I learned a new git trick.  I've removed the vendor directory from the first commit and have repushed.
